title: Question Carousel: Elicitation Depth
description: Set the depth of problem elicitation for Phase 0

question.text: How deep should the problem discovery process go?

options.label: Quick
options.description: 3 assumption checks, linear root cause analysis (~3 layers), minimal stakeholder mapping
options.consequences: Faster (15-20 min) but may miss non-obvious root causes

options.label: Standard
options.description: 5-7 assumption checks, recursive root cause analysis (~5 layers), full stakeholder map
options.consequences: Balanced depth (30-45 min), good for most projects

options.label: Deep
options.description: 10+ assumption checks, multi-branch analysis, stakeholder interviews simulation, competitive framing
options.consequences: Thorough (1-2 hours), best for complex or high-risk projects
